title: gcp-sm 401 maps to Backend not Unavailable — no signal to refresh token
description: GCP_ACCESS_TOKEN is stored at construction and never refreshed. When the token expires the API returns 401. Currently 401 maps to SecretError::Backend (permanent error). Callers have no way to distinguish 'token expired, reconstruct with fresh token' from 'bad credentials, fix your config'. Should map to Unavailable with a message referencing GCP_ACCESS_TOKEN expiry, so callers know to retry after refreshing the token.
